[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000101 2
1 000011010 3
2 100101111 6
3 101101011 6
4 010111011 6
5 110111011 7
6 000101111 5
7 101001001 4
